title: Create-Themed Happy Ghast Goggles
description: Gives your happy ghast Engineer's Goggles from Create!
body:
Ever thought that the goggles on happy ghasts looked a bit off, but don't want to remove them entirely? Or just like the Create mod? Well this resource pack is for you. It retextures happy ghast goggles into the Engineer's Goggles from Create, and though it may not be as high-quality as new ghast textures are, keeps faithful to Create's design of the goggles.

![A display of all happy ghast harness colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8d373bb1df29befac1b9fb70d10dc0dd62c06c.png)

You're allowed to use this resource pack in videos, modpacks, etc. so long as you link back to this page properly and give credit.
